projects.title: NicoleTrader
projects.subtitle: Autonomous AI Trading System
bullets: Built and deployed an autonomous AI trading system executing live Bitcoin trades via real-time signal logic and pattern recognition — running on actual capital, not a sandbox
Engineered ML-informed risk protocols: drawdown constraints, volatility filters, and position-sizing logic derived from statistical modeling of historical market data
Designed real-time P&L dashboards tracking predictive signal accuracy, win rates, and trade performance — with feedback loops that catch model drift and trigger recalibration
Integrated live data pipelines via TradingView and Coinbase APIs; hands-on with financial data infrastructure, latency tradeoffs, and production AI realities

projects.title: Salem Mania
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack AI-Assisted Editorial Platform
bullets: Founded a fully operational literary publication from scratch at 17 — built the submission system, editorial pipeline, and mobile-optimized public site solo
Deployed AI tooling into the editorial workflow: LLM-based submission triage, automated draft feedback, and formatting consistency checks across contributor work
Architected a seven-layer Flask security backend with privacy-first analytics — data integrity and access control at enterprise product standards
Leads a distributed team spanning Cornell '30, Rutgers '30, and Ohio State '30 — coordinating across institutions, time zones, and competing schedules

projects.title: Freelance Web Development
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack Client Work
bullets: Shipped full-stack client sites with Flask backends, custom analytics dashboards, and multi-layer form infrastructure — from brief to deployed, solo
Wired LLM APIs into live client workflows for content generation, UX copy, and automated QA — real AI integration, not demos
Built security-layered backends with privacy-first analytics engines; applied data governance standards used in regulated AI and fintech deployments
